extraction.one_line_summary: DOMBROWSKI Joe attacked from 25-rider breakaway on final climb, dropped DE MARCHI in closing kilometers to win by 13 seconds while DE MARCHI took maglia rosa.
tactical_patterns: Ganna-led Ineos worked for Bernal despite maglia rosa, signaling immediate willingness to sacrifice jersey for GC positioning.
25-rider breakaway with 6+ minutes allowed clear fuga bidone, showing peloton's early-Giro risk tolerance for non-GC threats.
Landa initiated GC selection on final climb with Bernal, Ciccone, Carthy, Vlasov responding, creating 11-second split over Almeida/Nibali group.

rider_signals.DOMBROWSKI Joe: positive: Former baby Giro winner finally converted climbing form to Grand Tour stage win after years of trying
rider_signals.DE MARCHI Alessandro: positive: Breakaway tactical intelligence secured maglia rosa despite losing stage, first pink jersey at age 34
rider_signals.VLASOV Aleksandr: positive: Only major GC contender responding to Landa attack, best-placed young rider suggests unexpected podium threat
rider_signals.ALMEIDA João: negative: Lost significant time (1:48+ group) on modest Apennine climb, early weakness for 2020 revelation
rider_signals.NIBALI Vincenzo: negative: Dropped to slower chase group on relatively minor climb, age/form concerns immediately visible
